'''Fangol''' was a small [[Temperature/Legends|frozen]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]], and was the site of a secret [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base. It had an [[Water/Legends|icy]] crust.

The planet was continually shrouded in an icy white mist that was formed from the ejecta of hundreds of ice [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]], which was [[Water/Legends|water]] vapor contaminated with metals and other elements. The mists reflected all light from [[Realspace/Legends|space]], making the planet appear to be a solid ball of white. It also reflected all [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] scans aimed at the planet. The mists also prevented individuals on the surface from scanning the surround [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. The mists themselves were [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] to breathe, and temperatures on the planet rarely exceeded minus 110 degrees Galactic Standard.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Fangol was the location of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Mortex Sector HQ]], which was buried underground. Communications and sensors were handled by an [[Fangol's artificial moon|artificial moon]] in geosynchronous [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over the base. A [[low-frequency transmitter]] communicated between the base and moon.
